column1: # AgSteer OTA Partition Table for ESP32-WROVER-E (16 MB Flash)
# HYBRID FACTORY + OTA layout (recommended by Espressif for production):
#   - factory: initial firmware (boots even if otadata is empty/corrupt)
#   - ota_0 / ota_1: OTA update slots (used after first OTA update)
#   - If otadata is invalid -> bootloader falls back to factory
#   - After successful OTA: bootloader uses otadata -> boots ota_0 or ota_1
